channel.title: TomatoBuster — CTF Writeups
channel.description: In-depth CTF writeups covering web, pwn, crypto, reversing and more.

item.title: DevArea — HTB Writeup
item.description: Chaining XOP and Aoache CXF exploitation with HoverFly RCE and Bash binary overwriting to gain full system access. HackTheBox 2026, Web, Medium.

item.title: Kobold — HTB Writeup
item.description: Exploiting an unauthenticated API and abusing a Docker socket to achieve container escape. HackTheBox 2026, MISC, Easy.

item.title: Silentium — HTB Writeup
item.description: Flowise AI api exploitation, Docker Escape and Gogs CVE. HackTheBox 2026, MISC, Easy.
